description_for_human: أكبر مكتبة كرتون عربي مجانية - شاهد أكثر من 8000 حلقة
description_for_model: Kartoney.com is the largest free Arabic cartoon and anime streaming library with 8,611 episodes across 107 series. Users can browse by genre (action, adventure, comedy, drama, fantasy, mystery, romance, sci-fi, sports, family), by era (80s, 90s, 2000s, 2010s), or by type (anime, classic, modern). The site is in Arabic with RTL layout.
